name: On Target Performance
about: On Target Performance is a premier indoor golf academy and fitness club located in Madera, California. Founded by Performance Coach Chris Doos, the facility offers state-of-the-art amenities including golf simulators, a practice putting green, and a comprehensive fitness center with a private treatment room and equipment like Keiser machines, kettlebells, and TRX. The academy provides a wide range of services such as professional golf lessons, custom club fittings, junior programs, personalized fitness training, and equipment sales from major brands. The operation is designed to develop high-performing student-athletes and create pathways for success in college and beyond. Pricing is structured around coaching packages and practice memberships, with options for private lessons and facility access.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan and Foresight GCQuad simulators
Comprehensive fitness and performance training integrated with golf
Access to a private putting green and full fitness center
Custom club fitting services with equipment from major brands
Junior programs and college pathway development

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor for simulation and data analysis
Photometric camera launch monitor for precise ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs. The facility also offers top-of-the-line golf equipment sales from all major brands if you need to purchase new clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of a kitchen or food service, so outside food and drink may be permitted. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for confirmation.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for an 18-hole simulation. It is best to contact On Target Performance directly for details on simulator round duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, On Target Performance offers junior lessons and summer camps, indicating it is a family-friendly establishment designed to develop young athletes.
